description: The agent initiates tool calls with parameters that accurately match the technician's query context, and does not provide direct answers without tool output.
Relevant safety warnings are included, placed at the start of the response, and clearly marked for immediate technician attention.
All available actionable technical details (part numbers, measurements, procedures) from tool outputs are included in the response, with no omissions.
Missing or conflicting data is explicitly flagged, and appropriate escalation instructions are provided when necessary.
The response is concise, direct, and structured for easy voice delivery, avoiding unnecessary elaboration or non-actionable content.
All information provided in the response is directly traceable to tool outputs, with no unverified or extraneous commentary.
Other important quality factors not covered by listed criteria.
